form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.54) at this track in a Grade 3/4, finishing fifth and beaten 2.5 lengths. Has two successes and six minors from 12 starts from box 1. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 4/5 on April 12 over 312m at this track behind Zombie Boss beaten 8 lengths (19.14). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.5 lengths in 18.42, beating Slept In Again. Last start finished 5th on January 11 over 312m at this track behind Pollinate beaten 3.5 lengths (18.66) in a Grade 4. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 312m in 18.24. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 312m at this track at Grade 4/5 level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
